properties.displayName: Audit diagnostic settings for Storage Account Table Services to Eventhub
properties.description: Audits storage accounts for Table service read, write and delete logs to make sure there are being sent to an event hub
nonComplianceMessages: The storage account Table service should have read, write and delete logs enabled and forwarded to an Event Hub. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
